title: Sapling Replanter
description: Automate sapling replanting with customizable settings and optional MCMMO integration.
body:
# 🌱 Sapling Replanter

**Sapling Replanter** is a lightweight plugin that automatically replants saplings after trees are chopped. With support for mcMMO, configurable chances, sapling consumption, and permission logic. Ideal for survival, RPG, or eco-focused servers.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🌲 Automatically replants saplings when trees are harvested
- 🧪 Optional mcMMO integration with level-based chance scaling
- 🎯 Configurable base chance and mcMMO thresholds
- 🪓 Treefeller-only mode for mcMMO users (optional)
- 🌱 Option to consume saplings from player inventory
- 🚫 Optionally ignore player-placed blocks
- 🔁 `/saplingreplanter reload` to apply config changes live
- 🔐 Permission system for usage, bypassing, and reloading

---

## 🛠️ Configuration Highlights

- Toggle replanting requirements like permissions or sapling cost
- Define custom replant chances per mcMMO level tier
- Decide whether to track and ignore player-placed logs
- Change behavior dynamically with `/saplingreplanter reload`

---

## 🔐 Permissions

| Node                         | Description                                   |
|------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| `replanter.use`              | Allows player to trigger sapling replanting   |
| `replanter.bypassconsume`    | Prevents sapling consumption                  |
| `replanter.mcmmoskip`        | Skips mcMMO level checks                      |
| `replanter.reload`           | Allows using the reload command               |

---

## 🧩 Dependencies

- ✅ **Spigot/Paper 1.20+**
- 🔌 Optional: [mcMMO](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/official-mcmmo-original-author-returns.64348/)
